error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Gemini API bad request due to missing parameters
symptom: When attempting to transcribe audio using the Gemini API, the user receives a 'Bad request - please check your parameters' error message indicating that contents are not specified.
applies_when: Using Gemini API for audio transcription
Audio file format may be incorrect
not_this_if: Using a different API or node for transcription
Error does not mention missing contents
root_cause: The Gemini API requires specific parameters to be included in the request, including the audio content. If these parameters are not correctly specified, the API will return a bad request error.
fix_steps: Ensure that the audio file is correctly formatted and accessible
Check the HTTP request parameters to include 'contents' with the audio data
Configure Google Gemini credentials in the HTTP node
agent_instruction: Include the audio content in the request parameters and ensure credentials are configured.
safety_notes: Ensure credentials are stored securely and not hardcoded in the workflow.
